name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Long Beach, CA's Western Union Money Order Only at 4323 E Anaheim St offers 24-hour money order and check-cashing services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only operates at 4323 E Anaheim St in Long Beach, CA, a standalone location open 24 hours daily to serve the community. This Long Beach facility is designed for accessibility around the clock, whether you need services early morning, late evening, or at any time in between. The location's extended hours make it a convenient choice for Long Beach residents with unpredictable schedules.

At this location, you can send and receive money orders, cash checks, and access related financial services. The staff is trained to handle transactions efficiently and accurately. For details about available services or to confirm offerings at this specific Long Beach address, call +1 562-494-8408; representatives are available 24/7.

When visiting this Western Union Money Order Only in Long Beach, bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method. Ask about applicable fees for your transaction type, as they vary. This location provides a reliable option for residents throughout the Long Beach area who need quick, accessible money order and check-cashing services in CA.
address: 4323 E Anaheim St, Long Beach, CA 90804

company_info.headquarters: 4323 E Anaheim St, Long Beach, CA 90804

pros: Extensive network of 150+ locations across multiple states through major retail partnerships (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Circle K)
24/7 online transaction initiation at WU.com with flexible pay-in-store and pickup options
Money order services available at dedicated locations (e.g., Circle K #0682 in Leadville)
Multilingual support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Real-time transfer tracking functionality available to customers
Diverse service options including bill payment, mobile top-up, and inmate payments beyond basic money orders
Western Union Rewards program for frequent users
cons: No transparent pricing displayed on website—customers must visit locations or call for specific money order fees and rates
Dependent on agent location hours (typically 8 PM-11:59 PM closing)—no true 24/7 in-person access despite online availability
Limited service availability at some locations (e.g., 'Money Order Services only'—full service not guaranteed at all agents)
Website geolocation feature requires browser permissions and may not work reliably for all users seeking nearby locations
No information provided about verification requirements, minimum/maximum transaction limits, or service restrictions
best_for: Consumers in rural or underserved areas without traditional banking access, who benefit from widespread retail agent locations
International remittance senders needing established networks and multilingual support for cross-border transfers
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking money order alternatives to checking accounts for bill payments
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing accessible money order and payment services through established retail partnerships, particularly those without traditional bank accounts or those sending international remittances. The main caveat is lack of transparent pricing on their website and service limitations that vary by location—customers must verify specific offerings and fees by phone before visiting.
services: Online account management and history tracking
Delivery method updates and price estimation
meta_description: Long Beach, CA's Western Union Money Order Only at 4323 E Anaheim St - open 24/7 for money orders and check-cashing.
